holdings.infoBox: SNPE is an equity ETF with a total of 335 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 12.79%, Microsoft at 7.36%, Alphabet at 5.36%, Alphabet at 4.30%, and Micron Technology at 3.03%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers S&P 500 Scored & Screened ETF (SNPE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Scored & Screened index. The fund tracks a principles-selected, market cap-weighted index of US large-cap securities. SNPE was launched on Jun 26, 2019 and is issued by Xtrackers.
